response: {"subfigures":[{"label":"a","description":"Pie charts showing experimental success results for 209 eCLIP experiments performed in K562 (top) or HepG2 (bottom) cell lines, with colors indicating the amount of amplification (eCT) required to obtain 100 fmoles of library. 102 experiments pass validation metrics and are deposited at ENCODE.","plot_type":"pie","plot_category":"categorical","x_axis":null,"y_axis":null,"color_variable":"eCT (amplification level required)","error_bars":"none","sample_size":"209 eCLIP experiments","shows_individual_points":false,"data_source":"http://www.encodeproject.org","assays":["eCLIP"],"supplementary_tables":["Supplementary Table 2"],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":"cell line (K562, HepG2)"},{"label":"b","description":"Scatter plot where each point represents a successful eCLIP experiment, with the x-axis showing the eCT of the best replicate (replicate 1) and the y-axis showing the increase in eCT between replicate 1 and replicate 2 (indicating decreased efficiency in the second replicate).
